subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified above the comprehension of all created things and the understanding of contingent beings, befitteth the most exalted and most holy Court of the Self-Subsisting Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ادراک کائنات و عرفان ممکنات ساحت امنع اقدس حضرت قیومی را لایق و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
